case_title: ENDALKACHEW GETANEH VS. THE AFRICAN IMMIGRANT & REFUGEE RESOURCE CENTER

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF GETANEH, ENDALKACHEW AS TO DEFENDANT THE AFRICAN IMMIGRANT & REFUGEE RESOURCE CENTER A CALIFORNIA NON-PROFIT CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GETANEH, ENDALKACHEW RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE AFRICAN IMMIGRANT & REFUGEE RESOURCE CENTER A CALIFORNIA NON-PROFIT CORPORATION $5,176.91 PRINCIPAL, $18.29 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,375.20, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF GETANEH, ENDALKACHEW AS TO DEFENDANT THE AFRICAN IMMIGRANT & REFUGEE RESOURCE CENTER A CALIFORNIA NON-PROFIT CORPORATION
